description.desc_thousand_char: Valuetree Ingredients Private Limited (VIPL) is engaged in the trading of chemicals. It distributes specialty ingredients for the beauty, personal care, food, and life sciences. It is an ECOVADIS, CDP, ISO 9001, 14001, and ISO 45001 certified company. The company was incorporated in 2000 and has its registered office located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

open_charges_latest_event.terms_of_payment: As mutually agreed from time to time
open_charges_latest_event.property_particulars: Exclusive charge for Credit facilities by way of hypothecation on current assets of the security providers including Stocks, goods in process, semi-finished and finished goods, consumable stores and spares and such other movables, Book Debts, Receivables, bills, whether documentary or clean both present and future (More clearly specified in the Schedule of SDOH attached herewith).
open_charges_latest_event.extent_and_operation: Exclusive charge for Credit facilities by way of hypothecation on current assets of the security providers including Stocks, goods in process, semi-finished and finished goods, consumable stores and spares and such other movables, Book Debts, Receivables, bills, whether documentary or clean both present and future (More clearly specified in the Schedule of SDOH attached herewith).
open_charges_latest_event.modification_particulars: By Present modification, the overall limit has enhanced to INR 80 Cr and the charge is further secured by Exclusive charge for Credit facilities by way of hypothecation on current assets of the security providers including Stocks, goods in process, semi- finished and finished goods, consumable stores and spares and such other movables, Book Debts, Receivables, bills, whether documentary or clean both present and future (More clearly specified in the Schedule of SDOH attached herewith).

charge_sequence.property_particulars: 1. ODBD facilitySecurities:- Hypothecation of book debts & stocks (for fixing DP only receivables upto 90 days & paid stock will be taken into account). HUL receivables of more than 30 days & less than 90 days shall be excluded from total receivables for DP calculation.2. Import/Inland LC on sight/usance basis facilitySecurities:- For import as well as domestic purchase of traded goods like chemicals, raw material for cosmetics etc., The usance period shall not exceed more than 90 days.

1.ODBD facilitySecurities:-Hypothecation of book debts & stocks (for fixing DP only receivables upto 90 days & paid stocks will be taken into account). HUL receivables of more than 30 days & less than 90 days shall be excluded from total receivables for DP calculation.  2.Import/Inland LC on sight/usance basis facilitySecurities:-For import as well as domestic purchase of traded goods like chemicals. Detergents, printing papers, stationeries etc. The usance period shall not exceed 90 days.

Hypothecation by way of first charge on stock of raw materials, work-in-progress, finished goods, consumable stores & spares and other merchandise and book debts, outstanding decrees, receivables, claims, bills.
Exclusive charge by way of Pledge on Units of Mutual Funds of 20% overall limits in favour of CITI Bank N.A (More clearly specified in the Schedules of Supp. Pledge attached herewith)

Direct Growth, iii)1445154.507 units of IDFC Corporate Bank Fund - Direct Growth and iv)12794.496 units of Axis Banking and PSV Debt Fund in Favour of Citibank N.A (more clearly specified in the Schedule I of the Agreement of Pledge attached).

charge_sequence.property_type: Others (Pledge on Units of Mutual Fund)
charge_sequence.property_particulars: Exclusive charge by way of pledge on units of mutual funds including - i)1445154.507 Units under IDFC Corporate Bond Fund Direct Plan – Growth scheme bearing ISIN - INF194KA1M23 and bearing Folio number 3506876 and margin of 15% of Overall limits, ii)13085.08 Units under Invesco India Banking & PSU Debt Fund – Direct Plan Growth scheme bearing ISIN – INF205K01KT4 and bearing Folio number 3041665674 and margin of 15% of Overall limits, iii)5256.14 Units under Axis Banking & PSU Debt Fund – Direct Plan Growth Option scheme bearing ISIN – INF846K01CR6 and bearing Folio no. 904577968 and margin of 15% of Overall limits for both present and future. More clearly specified in the Schedule I of Supplementary Deed to Memorandum Relating to Pledge of Units of Mutual fund attached herewith.

charge_sequence.property_type: Book debts,Floating charge,Others (Current Assets,Pledge on Units of Mutual Fund)
charge_sequence.property_particulars: Exclusive Charge by way of hypothecation of the Current Assets(Stocks, Book Debts and Receivables) of the borrower, both present and future.Exclusive Charge by way of pledge on Units of Mutual Fund in favour of Citibank N.A.(Margin 15% of Facility Amount) as mentioned below:1. 13085.08 units of Invesco India Banking & PSU Debt Fund- Direct Growth2. 5256.14 units of Axis Banking & PSU Debt Fund Direct- Growth Options3.500153.18 units of IDFC Corporate Bond Fund- Direct Growth(More clearly specified in the Schedule 1 of Amendment and Restatement Deed of Hypothecation &Supplemental Deed of Memorandum Relating To Pledge of Units of Mutual Funds attached herewith).

charge_sequence.property_type: Book debts,Floating charge,Others (Current Assets,Pledge on Units of Mutual Fund)
charge_sequence.property_particulars: Exclusive Charge by way of hypothecation of the Current Assets(Stocks, Book Debts and Receivables) of the borrower, both present and future.Exclusive Charge by way of pledge on Units of Mutual Fund in favour of Citibank N.A. as mentioned below:1. 13085.082 units of Invesco India Banking & PSU Debt Fund- Direct Growth2. 5256.139 units of Axis Banking & PSU Debt Fund Direct- Growth3.500153.181 units of IDFC Corporate Bond Fund- Direct Growth(More clearly specified in the Schedule 1 of Deed of Hypothecation &Supplemental Deed of Memorandum Relating To Pledge of Units of Mutual Funds attached herewith).

Exclusive charge on pledge of units of Mutual Fund in favour of Citibank N.A to secure the credit facility granted to the borrower( more clearly specified in Schedule I of Deed of modification for memorandum relating to Pledge of units of Mutual Funds attached).
